overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic vehicle through Night City. The clip begins with the player waiting at an intersection under an overpass, then turning left and accelerating through the intersection. The scene features typical cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic dashboard displays, futuristic vehicles, and urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: stationary behind a futuristic SUV waiting at a traffic light under an overpass, hands off steering wheel

notable_agents.action: futuristic beige SUV with vertical LED taillights stopped ahead with brake lights illuminated, blocking the intersection
blue sedan waiting in the left adjacent lane, visible through side window

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating a canopy overhead
tropical palm trees visible through the atmospheric haze under the overpass structure
red and white striped safety barrier running along the right side of the roadway
futuristic car dashboard with glowing red holographic displays and digital speedometer readout

segments.scene_description: The player waits stationary in a futuristic vehicle beneath a massive concrete overpass in Night City. Ahead, a beige SUV with distinctive vertical taillights blocks the intersection while a blue sedan waits in the adjacent lane. The scene is characterized by the red glow of the holographic dashboard and the hazy, diffused light filtering through the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: driver grips steering wheel and initiates left turn maneuver as traffic clears
vehicle exits the sheltered overpass area into the open intersection with increased visibility

agents.ego_description: executing a left turn at the intersection, accelerating through the crosswalk and proceeding into the street

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines marking the pedestrian walkway across the intersection
vertical traffic light fixture displaying green signal for proceeding traffic
modern multi-story commercial building with glass facade and urban architectural details

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates from the stop, turning left through the intersection crosswalk. The concrete overpass recedes behind as the car enters the open street, passing rows of parked vehicles along the right curb. The traffic signal shows green as the player drives toward the commercial buildings ahead, with palm trees now visible to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a futuristic vehicle as it moves from a shadowed urban underpass into a bright, open city street. It begins stationary beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the red glow of a holographic dashboard illuminates the interior while a beige SUV and blue sedan wait ahead in the hazy, diffused light. As the vehicle accelerates, the camera turns left through the intersection crosswalk, causing the heavy concrete structure to recede into the background. The scene then opens up into a wider thoroughfare, passing rows of parked cars along the curb under a green traffic signal. Finally, the view expands toward distant commercial buildings as palm trees appear along the right side of the frame.
